name: Despec Bilgisayar Pazarlama ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Despec Bilgisayar Pazarlama ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi distributes ICT consumables in Turkey and internationally. It offers toners, ink cartridges, and tape backup and paper products; and IT accessories and mobile products. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
